documents.name: KMRL_Train_Operations_Circular.pdf
documents.text:
Kochi Metro Rail Limited (KMRL)
Train Operations Circular
Reference No: KMRL/OPS/2026/0417
Date: 17 April 2026
Subject: Revised Peak Hour Train Schedule and Passenger
Assistance Measures
Revised peak hour services will be implemented from 20 April 2026. Additional train frequency shall
operate between Aluva and SN Junction during rush hours.
Instructions:
1. Morning peak frequency every 6 minutes from 07:00 to 10:00 hrs.
2. Evening peak frequency every 6 minutes from 17:00 to 20:30 hrs.
3. Deploy marshals at high-footfall stations.
4. Multilingual announcements required.
5. Escalate disruptions above 5 minutes to OCC.
StationFootfallAction
AluvaHigh2 Marshals
KaloorHighQueue Control
MG RoadMediumAnnouncements
SN JunctionHighSupervision
Issued by: Chief Operations Manager, KMRL
For project testing/demo purposes.
